arts.ttl: Bukayo Saka reveals Arsenal's Martin Odegaard replacement plan amid Man City criticism
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka has said that Arsenal must find a way to cope without Martin Odegaard ahead of their top of the table clash with Manchester City. In his absence the Gunners have been able to secure a 1-0 win over Tottenham in the North London Derby and a 0-0 draw in Bergamo against the Europa League champions.

arts.ttl: De Bruyne, Rodri, Ake - Latest Man City injury news and return dates before Arsenal clash
arts.sum: Manchester City injury news as Pep Guardiola has a number of fitness concerns to deal with ahead of the Premier League clash with Arsenal

arts.ttl: Arsenal land fresh Isak transfer incentive as Arteta sent £54m double message
arts.sum: If Newcastle continue playing this way, Isak will likely be far more open to an exit especially if another season passes him by without European football. City meanwhile, are also unbeaten and can return to the top of the Premier League table if they avoid defeat, though they come into the game having failed to score in a European clash against Inter earlier this week.

arts.ttl: 'Disappear' - Pep Guardiola uses 115 punishment point to slam Man City critics
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has leapt to the defence of Manchester City and the reaction to their performances this week against Brentford and Inter Milan - by sending a cheeky dig at their rivals using the club's 115 Premier League charges.

arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Gunners given transfer hope as Declan Rice opens up on Mikel Arteta meeting
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta's Arsenal have a chance to finish the weekend top of the Premier League table if they can get the better of reigning champions Manchester City on Sunday

arts.ttl: Emile Smith Rowe Arsenal transfer buy-back clause explained as Fulham star shines again
arts.sum: Smith Rowe, who earned the Gunners £34million with his move to Fulham after two seasons in footballing purgatory, already has as many goals as any of his former teammates this season (although he has played an extra match at the time of writing). Kai Havertz, Leandro Trossard, and eventually Raheem Sterling plus Mikel Merino all arrived in the last two years of Smith Rowe's stay at Arsenal, whilst Odegaard was signed previously to ramp up the quality in attacking areas.

arts.ttl: Man City vs Arsenal: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: The biggest game of the Premier League season arrives on Sunday afternoon as reigning champions Manchester City host last term's runners-up Arsenal. Man City predicted lineup vs Arsenal (4-2-3-1): Ederson; Walker, Akanji, Dias, Gvardiol; Rodri, Kovacic; Foden, Silva, Grealish; Haaland.

arts.ttl: Arsenal will be sitting ducks if Mikel Arteta's only plan at Man City is to survive, writes DANNY MURPHY - and one name on the team sheet will tell you if he's going to sit back
arts.sum: DANNY MURPHY: Arsenal definitely have the tools to fight for the Premier League again and Sunday afternoon's clash looks highly significant - even in September.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer target Joan Garcia addresses failed Premier League move
arts.sum: Espanyol goalkeeper Joan Garcia opens up on his experience of the recent summer transfer window after being the subject of bids from Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola: People want to see Man City wiped from face of the Earth
arts.sum: City are facing the threat of a points deduction or even expulsion from the Premier League.
